records.m_Talk_ENG: The path clearly ends in ruin, yet the ignorant still struggle to understand it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The path clearly ends in ruin, yet the ignorant still struggle to understand it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The path clearly ends in ruin, yet the ignorant still struggle to understand it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter. Their frenzy has gathered all the starlight I require.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter. Their frenzy has gathered all the starlight I require.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter. Their frenzy has gathered all the starlight I require.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All that remains is to tune the Armament through the Star Guide's light.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All that remains is to tune the Armament through the Star Guide's light.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All that remains is to tune the Armament through the Star Guide's light.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, grudge of a failed world...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, grudge of a failed world...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, grudge of a failed world...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I shall release you from that pitiful regret. I will take that power myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I shall release you from that pitiful regret. I will take that power myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I shall release you from that pitiful regret. I will take that power myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The moment we crossed the boundary, the landscape changed in an instant.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The moment we crossed the boundary, the landscape changed in an instant.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The moment we crossed the boundary, the landscape changed in an instant.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Just like before, this must be
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Just like before, this must be
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Just like before, this must be
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you thought repeating a failed past would make me retreat, you've underestimated me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you thought repeating a failed past would make me retreat, you've underestimated me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you thought repeating a failed past would make me retreat, you've underestimated me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if the stars warn me away, I will not step back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if the stars warn me away, I will not step back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if the stars warn me away, I will not step back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will save you from this nightmare.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will save you from this nightmare.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will save you from this nightmare.
